title: Cosmos SDK tendermint.types.SignedMsgType Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the tendermint.types.SignedMsgType module of the Cosmos SDK gRPC-gateway REST API.

tendermint.types.SignedMsgType.description:
SignedMsgType is a type of signed message in the consensus.

 - SIGNED_MSG_TYPE_PREVOTE: Votes
 - SIGNED_MSG_TYPE_PROPOSAL: Proposals
